tasks.title: Review collaboration bootstrap
acceptance_criteria: Verify that Codex and Claude Code have clear entrypoint instructions
Verify that task and handoff conventions are understandable
Verify that LangGraph boundaries are documented
Record required fixes or approve the bootstrap

tasks.title: Implement minimal LangGraph runner
acceptance_criteria: Selects ready tasks whose dependencies are satisfied
Does not treat LangGraph state as canonical project storage

tasks.title: Design SQLite task board migration
acceptance_criteria: Defines tables for agents, tasks, claims, messages, artifacts, reviews, decisions, and events
Explains atomic task claims and lease expiration
Maps current file-backed state to future SQLite tables
